---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for the platform.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Problem It Solves

Explain the current limitation, workflow pain point, or missed opportunity.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change as clearly as possible. Keep it practical and implementation-friendly.

## Expected Result

Describe what the user, admin, or maintainer should be able to do after this is added.

## Additional Context

Add examples, mockups, links, or technical notes that could help evaluate the request.
